commands: bash -c 'echo "=== docker ps ==="; docker ps; echo "=== docker ps -a ==="; docker ps -a; echo "=== curl localhost:8000/health ==="; curl -s --max-time 3 http://localhost:8000/health || echo FAIL; echo "=== curl localhost/api/health ==="; curl -s --max-time 3 http://localhost/api/health || echo FAIL; echo "=== curl surfing.heyi.co.il/api/health ==="; curl -s --max-time 5 http://surfing.heyi.co.il/api/health || echo FAIL; echo "=== systemctl nginx ==="; systemctl is-active nginx; echo "=== nginx config check ==="; nginx -t 2>&1 || echo NGINX_CONF_ERROR'
